items.question: What is an omnichannel customer support platform?
items.answer: An omnichannel customer support platform unifies all customer communication channels — such as WhatsApp, Instagram, email, chat and phone — into a single interface. Hello offers this with integrated AI, allowing your team to handle more customers with less effort while maintaining the full history of each conversation.

items.question: How does the WhatsApp Business API integration work?
items.answer: Hello connects through the official WhatsApp Business Platform. You verify your business, choose or bring your number, and manage templates, opt-ins and conversations from Hello’s inbox — with delivery and quality metrics built in. Our team helps you go live without juggling multiple tools.

items.question: Is Hello compliant with the LGPD (Brazil's data protection law)?
items.answer: Yes. Hello is built with privacy and compliance in mind, including controls aligned with LGPD requirements. A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available in Portuguese, and you can work with our team on data residency, retention and export questions for your use case.

items.question: Can I automate customer service with AI?
items.answer: Yes. You can deploy no-code chatbots, use AI-suggested replies for agents, automate routing and tagging, and scale with voice and workflow tools — so repetitive questions are handled instantly while humans focus on complex cases.

items.question: What's the difference between Hello and a traditional ticketing system?
items.answer: Traditional ticketing is often channel-siloed and ticket-centric. Hello is conversation-centric: every channel feeds one timeline per customer, with AI, automation and analytics on top — so context never gets lost when someone switches from WhatsApp to email or chat.

items.question: How does BRL pricing work?
items.answer: Plans and usage can be quoted and billed in Brazilian Reais (BRL) for Brazil-based teams, with clear limits for agents, channels and tickets. Contact sales for a tailored quote, volume tiers and contract options that match your operation.

items.question: Does Hello offer support in Portuguese?
items.answer: Yes. Product materials, contracts and customer success touchpoints are available in Portuguese for Brazil, and you can reach our team in your language for onboarding and ongoing support.

items.question: How long does it take to implement Hello?
items.answer: Many teams connect their first channels in hours. Full rollout — agents trained, automations live, WhatsApp approved — typically ranges from a few days to a couple of weeks depending on channels, templates and internal approvals.
